# STARTER_BRAND_POSITIONING_PASS

Use this starter for **Brand Positioning Pass**.

## Load order
- `dist/DEPLOY_LITE.md`
- `dist/runtime/route_cards/rt_brand_positioning.md`
- `dist/runtime/contracts_lite/brand_positioning_pass.md`
- `dist/runtime/skills/brand-strategy-expert.md`
- `dist/runtime/skills/content-and-case-study-expert.md`
- optional: `dist/runtime/skills/ux-research-expert.md`
- `dist/SESSION_ZERO.md`

## Best for
- Use when the system must decide who the brand is for and how it earns trust.

## Estimated footprint
- Approximate startup size with governing skills: ~2319 words / ~3084 tokens

## Escalate instead to
- `dist/DEPLOY_BRAND.md` when the task widens inside one domain
- `dist/DESIGNPILOT_DEPLOY.md` when multiple domains or proof-sensitive conflicts are central

## Suggested kickoff prompt
I am starting a lightweight DesignPilot session for Brand Positioning Pass. Use the loaded lite bootstrap, this route, and this contract. Ask only for the missing context that would materially change routing or output quality.
